title: The Skull Dome Battle Spreads
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, King, Kaido as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...to destroy the Kozuki before my death.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That was more bother- some than expected.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Those pests tried to stall me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "You want to take me on alone, "LORD OF THE DAY?"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've both sustained substantial in- juries... I should be more than enough!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This isn't about settling our grudge anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't allow a rabid beast like you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...to continue causing casual- ties!! That's why I'm going to put you down, Jack!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Everyone, I leave momono- suke-sama to you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: quickly, put it out! We can't let it get too big!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: How dare you double- cross me,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no escape up here in the sky! Now go to hell!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll make him pay!!! I'm going to slaughter everyone!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 34 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
